hero.title: Registered Safe Garden
hero.text: We collect fruits from our registered & harmful-chemical free fruit gardens.

features.title: Garden Fresh Delivery
features.text: We take pre-orders from customers and deliver quicker direct from garden to table.

features.title: Premium Quality Product
features.text: We only select and sort premium standards fruits for your best experience.

features.title: Premium Packaging
features.text: Maybe you want to gift yourself, your family, your colleague the best packaged one.
